meta.maintenanceInstruction: KEEP THE PLAN UP TO DATE AS YOU EVOLVE THE CODE. DEVIATIONS TO THE PLAN MUST BE LOGGED WITHIN THE PLAN. THE PLAN MUST BE REASSESSED HOLISTICALLY AFTER ANY CHANGE OF ANY SIZE.
meta.completionPolicy: YOU ARE NOT DONE UNTIL YOU HAVE COMPLETED 100% OF THE BLUEPRINT. DO NOT STOP. YOU MUST REFINE AT REGULAR INTERVALS TO KEEP THE BLUEPRINT FULL. NEVER SPECIFY ANY ESTIMATE OF EFFORT OR COST. NEVER SPECIFY A PRIORITY OF ANY KIND.
meta.blueprintRefinement: THIS BLUEPRINT MUST BE CONTINUALLY REFINED. After completing any task, before starting the next, re-read this file and assess whether it still accurately captures reality. If any task description is stale, wrong, unclear, or missing context — FIX IT NOW.

globalAlerts.warning: INTEGRATION TESTS: Ollama IS AVAILABLE in the host environment. Real integration tests MUST be run. The code MUST do something useful end-to-end.
TOOLS: Use config.mk custom targets (make via mcp-server-make). Pipe through tail after tee to build.log. Use 'make make-all-with-log'.
CROSS-PLATFORM: ALL checks must pass on macOS, Linux (Docker via make-all-in-container), Windows (host 'moo' via make-all-run-windows). Zero tolerance.
TIMING: Tests MUST NOT be timing-dependent. No flaky tests. Race detector must pass.
SESSION TIMER: File .session-timer | make check-session-time. 9-hour mandate.
RULE OF TWO: Two contiguous issue-free subagent reviews of IDENTICAL diff before any commit. Reset on any code change.
DEADCODE: NEVER add ignores to .deadcodeignore. Wire up the code or delete it.
BUILD: Run 'make make-all-with-log' after EVERY code change. Zero failures before proceeding.

mandatoryDirectives.contextManagement: One task at a time, in order. Do not attempt to solve all tasks in a single turn.
mandatoryDirectives.subagentPolicy: Use subagents for Rule of Two review gate ONLY. Work subagents do NOT self-review.
mandatoryDirectives.blueprintRefinement: Continual refinement required. After every task, re-read and fix stale descriptions.
mandatoryDirectives.runMakeAfterEveryChange: Run 'make make-all-with-log' after EVERY code change. Zero failures before proceeding.
mandatoryDirectives.commitPolicy: Commit in logical chunks after passing Rule of Two. Do NOT accumulate massive diffs.

sequentialTasks.task: T200: Fix TUI regex for Ollama model selection character
sequentialTasks.description: Fixed reSelectedArrow regex in model_nav.go from [❯>] to [❯>▸►→]. Added 4 tests: OllamaTriangleArrow, RightwardsArrow, BlackPointer, OllamaTriangleArrow_NavigateToModel. Build GREEN.

Added splitCommand() to pty.go with POSIX shell word-splitting (single/double quotes, backslash escapes). Wired into Spawn in pty_unix.go — splits cfg.Command when Args is empty. 16 unit tests for splitCommand + 2 integration tests (command-with-spaces, explicit-args-no-split). Build GREEN.

No-op: splitCommand is in shared pty.go (no build tags), compiles on Windows. TestSplitCommand runs on Windows. Windows Spawn is a stub returning ErrNotSupported — it doesn't use Command/Args. Windows-specific escaping (caret, CMD.exe rules) will be added when ConPTY support lands. Adding it now would be dead code.

Created provider_ollama.go with OllamaProvider: Name=ollama, Capabilities={MCP:false, Streaming:true, MultiTurn:true, ModelNav:true}. Spawn ignores opts.Model (TUI nav instead). Added ModelNav field to ProviderCapabilities. 12 tests in provider_ollama_test.go. Build GREEN.
Wired into resolveProvider() in claude_mux.go (handles 'ollama' case). Also added JS factory 'ollama(opts?)' in module.go with command/subArgs support. Error msg lists all providers. Build GREEN.

sequentialTasks.task: T205: Wire SafetyValidator into claudemux run() pipeline
sequentialTasks.description: Wired SafetyValidator into dispatchTask and dynamicDispatchLoop. Added --safety flag. When enabled, each agent output line passes through Validate(). PolicyBlock aborts task. PolicyWarn logs. Default disabled. Passed through run→dispatchTask→output loop. Build GREEN.

sequentialTasks.task: T206: Wire MCPInstanceConfig auto-injection into dispatchTask
sequentialTasks.description: Wired MCPInstanceConfig into dispatchTask. After registry.Create(), creates per-instance MCP config if provider supports MCP (Capabilities().MCP). WriteConfigFile(), appends SpawnArgs() to taskSpawnOpts.Args, defers Close(). Graceful fallback if config fails. Build GREEN.

Fleshed out integration_test.go stubs: resolveTestProvider helper, collectUntil with timeout, splitTerminalLines, truncateStr. TestIntegration_ProviderSpawn now actually spawns provider + collects output. Added integration-test-claudemux target to project.mk (PROVIDER=ollama MODEL=gpt-oss:20b-cloud). Build GREEN.

sequentialTasks.task: T208: TUI navigation integration test with real Ollama
sequentialTasks.description: TestIntegration_MenuNavigation fleshed out: spawns provider, collectUntil detects menu (≥2 models), ParseModelMenu, NavigateToModel, sends keystrokes via PTY, verifies post-nav output. Skips if provider lacks ModelNav capability. Build GREEN.

sequentialTasks.task: T209: End-to-end PR split execution test
